issues.message: Spread props on <FileField> bypass prop validation.
issues.suggestion: Pass props explicitly so they can be validated against the component's API.

issues.message: Inline style on bypasses the design system (width, height, objectFit, borderRadius).
issues.suggestion: Use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns, Inset, Container) and theme tokens instead of inline styles.

issues.message: Computed color value "oklab(0.444 0.00309857 0.0105546 / 0.8)" on <button> (“Show suggestions”) does not map to a known design token.
issues.suggestion: If this is intentional, ignore the warning. Otherwise, use a Marigold variant or a theme-rui token instead of a hard-coded value.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > form:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(7) > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(2)

issues.message: Computed border-color value "oklab(0.444 0.00309857 0.0105546 / 0.8)" on <button> (“Show suggestions”) does not map to a known design token.
issues.suggestion: If this is intentional, ignore the warning. Otherwise, use a Marigold variant or a theme-rui token instead of a hard-coded value.

issues.message: Computed outline-color value "oklab(0.444 0.00309857 0.0105546 / 0.8)" on <button> (“Show suggestions”) does not map to a known design token.
issues.suggestion: If this is intentional, ignore the warning. Otherwise, use a Marigold variant or a theme-rui token instead of a hard-coded value.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > form:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(7) > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(2)

issues.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: <Inline> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Inline>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: Content uses only 55% of the desktop width (1280px): it stays in a narrow, mobile-shaped band instead of adapting to the available space.
issues.suggestion: Let the layout grow with the viewport using Marigold responsive primitives — <Columns collapseAt="..."> for multi-column areas, AppLayout for the shell, Stack/Inline for flow — instead of a fixed-width container. (Intentionally centred max-width reading columns are fine and may trip this; treat it as a relative signal.)

issues.message: Document should have one main landmark (landmark-one-main)
issues.suggestion: Wrap your page content in `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` to provide a `<main>` landmark. Import AppLayout from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Page should contain a level-one heading (page-has-heading-one)
issues.suggestion: Add a `<Headline level={1}>` component for the page title — it renders an `<h1>`. Import Headline from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: All page content should be contained by landmarks — 10 elements affected (region)
issues.suggestion: All page content must be inside a landmark region. Use `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` for the main area, `<TopNavigation>` for the header (`<header>`), and `<Sidebar>` for side navigation (`<aside>`). Import from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: Interactive element <input> (input) is not reachable via Tab key.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the element is focusable. Marigold interactive components are focusable by default — check if a parent has tabindex="-1" or focus is trapped.

details.selector: body:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > form:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > input:nth-child(1)

issues.message: Component order inconsistency: Tab moved from <button> at (639, 719) to <button> at (586, 684).
issues.suggestion: Reorder components in JSX to match the visual layout, or use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns) to control both visual and DOM order.
